title: xyris baldwiniana var. tenuifolia
intro: Xyris baldwiniana var. tenuifolia, also known as the Baldwin's xyris or slender bog xyris, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Xyridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with Xyris baldwiniana var. tenuifolia include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and alleviating fever. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally for its therapeutic effects.
